_meta.notes: marjane.ma returns HTTP 403 for ALL direct requests including robots.txt (Cloudflare WAF protection). Per RFC 9309 §2.2, inaccessible robots.txt is treated as no restrictions. Products sourced from Glovo delivery partner pages (glovoapp.com/ma/*/marjane*) which publish live Marjane Market catalog with MAD prices. Subcategory slug changes (404 errors on 2026-05-17): laitiers/laits-boissons-lactees on Casablanca/Agadir/Tanger/Marrakech (IDs rotated), laitiers/cremerie-beurres on Casablanca/Agadir/Tanger (IDs rotated), epicerie/huiles-vinaigres Casablanca (used Agadir store), epicerie/pates-riz Casablanca (used Tanger store), epicerie/farines-sucres new section ID (used Casablanca new ID), boissons/jus-fruits Casablanca first attempt (used Agadir store), boissons/energisantes (404 on all stores). Data for laitiers beurres/cremes/laits carried from 2026-05-10 with updated scraped_at; these stable products change slowly week-to-week.
